nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 卡蘭杜拉
nodes.summary: 卡蘭杜拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括White-headed robin-chat，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-headed robin-chat
nodes.summary: White-headed robin-chat（White-headed robin-chat，学名 Cossypha heinrichi），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 刚果民主共和国
nodes.summary: 刚果民主共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联274种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Black guinea fowl、剛果孔雀等274种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 鹟科
nodes.summary: 鹟科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括方尾鶲、Yellow-eyed black flycatcher、Southern black flycatcher等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Rand|Rand]], 1955 | synonyms = }} The white-headed robin-chat (Cossypha heinrichi) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in northern Angola and the western Democratic Republic of the Congo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In northern Angola, the white-headed robin-chat has only been recorded in two areas, including the type locality about north of Calandula. In the western Democratic Republic of the Congo, it has been recorded in Bombo-Lumene Forest Reserve and a few nearby sites. In Angola, the bird occurs in the undergrowth of gallery forests at an elevation of , and it is sometimes found in savannas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Democratic Republic of the Congo, it has been found in isolated patches of thick forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, and its IUCN conservation status is the least concern

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: In Bombo-Lumene Forest Reserve, the species is threatened by deforestation for charcoal
